message:
test(extensions): add SEC-3.3A-TEST calibration and replay suite (bd-3nvpz)

10 E2E tests for Bayesian scorer explanation calibration:
- Replay parity: identical traces yield identical explanation payloads
- Schema/contributor structure validation on every entry
- E-process and conformal signal accumulation tracking
- Explanation level escalation matches enforcement severity
- Replay decision path reconstruction with explanation matching
- Contribution ranking stability under adversarial perturbation
- Artifact bundle with hash chain for postmortem defensibility
- Action progression through benign/adversarial/recovery phases
- JSONL logging contract validation for explanation fields
- Budget-bounded replay with runtime enforcement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
